name: Sheila Finkelstein
seeking: Sheila Finkelstein's relationship coaching practice would benefit from referral partnerships with divorce attorneys, family mediators, and therapists who encounter clients needing structured coaching rather than clinical intervention. Co-promotion with life coaches serving personal growth seekers, as well as collaborations with event organizers running couples or singles retreats, would expand her reach. A joint offering with a communication skills trainer or a mindfulness coach would complement her work for clients wanting to improve both personal and professional connections.
who_you_serve: Individuals and couples seeking relationship coaching and counseling services.
what_you_do: Focus on relationship coaching and counseling services.
offering: Relationship coaching for personal and professional connections.
bio: Sheila Finkelstein leads Relationships. They are dedicated to delivering exceptional results for their clients.
service_provided: 1:1 coaching, group programs, consulting, transformation sessions
social_proof: References, testimonials, and media features (not specified in detail)
